description: Autonomous ML-based crypto trading system for WEEX perpetual futures with 4-model ensemble, adaptive risk management, and regime-aware execution

userStories.title: Core Configuration & Settings Module
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a centralized configuration system using Pydantic Settings so that all trading parameters are validated and type-safe
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/core/config.py with Pydantic Settings class
Include position sizing limits (5-20% per trade, 15-45% per pair, 30-95% total)
Include risk controls (20x max leverage, 5-7% daily drawdown, 15% total, $9000 minimum)
Include trade frequency limits (3600s cooldown, 12 max trades/day)
Create .env.example with all required environment variables
userStories.notes: Foundation module - all other modules depend on this

userStories.title: Database Layer with SQLite
userStories.description: As a system, I need persistent storage for candles, trades, and model metadata so that data survives restarts
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/data/database.py with async SQLite support using aiosqlite
Implement tables: candles, trades, ai_log_uploads, training_cache, performance_metrics
Create async methods: initialize_db(), save_candle(), get_candles(), save_trade(), get_trades()
Add connection pooling and proper error handling
Write unit tests for all database operations
userStories.notes: Required by all components that need persistence

userStories.title: WEEX REST Client for Account & Orders
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to interact with WEEX exchange API for account info and order management
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/data/rest_client.py with async aiohttp client
Implement HMAC-SHA256 request signing per WEEX API spec
Add rate limiting (respect WEEX limits) and retry logic with exponential backoff
Add proper error handling and logging

userStories.title: WEEX WebSocket Client for Real-Time Data
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need real-time market data streaming from WEEX for live trading signals
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/data/websocket_client.py with async websockets library
Connect to WEEX WebSocket endpoints for candle, ticker, orderbook channels
Implement auto-reconnection with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, max 60s)
Parse and validate incoming candle messages into typed dataclasses
Implement subscription management for multiple symbols
Add heartbeat/ping handling to maintain connection

userStories.title: Data Gateway with Quality Gates
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to filter bad/stale data before it reaches the feature layer to prevent garbage-in-garbage-out
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/data/data_gateway.py with quality gate pipeline
Implement OHLCLogicValidator (high >= low, open/close within range)
Create FallbackDataProvider for circuit breaker scenarios

userStories.title: Technical Indicators Feature Module
userStories.description: As an ML pipeline, I need 35 technical indicators calculated from candle data for model features
acceptanceCriteria: Implement Stochastic (K, D), MACD (line, signal, histogram)
All calculations use numpy for performance
Unit tests for each indicator with known values

userStories.title: Microstructure Features Module
userStories.description: As an ML pipeline, I need orderbook and market microstructure features for model input
acceptanceCriteria: Implement funding_rate extraction from exchange data
All features return normalized values suitable for ML

userStories.title: Feature Pipeline Orchestrator
userStories.description: As an ML pipeline, I need a unified pipeline that calculates all 86 features from raw data
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/features/pipeline.py orchestrating all feature modules
Combine Technical (35) + Microstructure (7) + Fee (5) + Cross-Asset (3) + Time (5) + Volatility (4) = 86 features
Implement fee features: maker_fee, taker_fee, funding_impact, fee_drag, breakeven_move
Implement time features: session_indicator, hour_sin, hour_cos, day_sin, day_cos
Implement volatility features: atr_ratio, realized_vol, vol_regime, vol_percentile
Return standardized feature dict with consistent naming
userStories.notes: Combines all feature modules into unified output

userStories.title: Feature Validator with Drift Detection
userStories.description: As an ML pipeline, I need to detect feature drift from training distribution to degrade confidence when data shifts
acceptanceCriteria: Implement CUSUM for persistent mean drift (> 5*std)
Calculate health score (0-100) from combined drift metrics
Calculate confidence multiplier based on health (0.1-1.0)
Create models/reference_distributions.json structure for baseline stats

userStories.title: XGBoost Model Wrapper
userStories.description: As an ML ensemble, I need an XGBoost model for primary trend prediction (30% ensemble weight)
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/ml/xgboost_model.py with model wrapper class
Implement train() method with XGBoost parameters optimized for tabular data
Implement save() and load() for model persistence
Implement health_check() for degenerate model detection
Handle feature alignment between training and inference

userStories.title: LightGBM Model Wrapper
userStories.description: As an ML ensemble, I need a LightGBM model for fast gradient boosting (25% ensemble weight)
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/ml/lightgbm_model.py with model wrapper class
Implement train() with LightGBM leaf-wise parameters
CRITICAL: Validate num_leaves > 1 to prevent degenerate trees
Implement save() and load() for model persistence
Implement health_check() detecting single-class prediction pattern
userStories.notes: 25% of ensemble weight - prone to degenerate trees issue

userStories.title: LSTM Model Wrapper
userStories.description: As an ML ensemble, I need an LSTM model for sequence pattern recognition (25% ensemble weight)
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/ml/lstm_model.py with PyTorch LSTM implementation
Implement LSTMModel class with configurable hidden_size, num_layers
Implement train() with proper sequence windowing (default 20 steps)
Implement predict() with GPU acceleration when available
Implement save() and load() for model state dict
Implement health_check() for prediction variance check

userStories.title: Random Forest Model Wrapper
userStories.description: As an ML ensemble, I need a Random Forest model for robust ensemble diversity (20% ensemble weight)
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/ml/random_forest_model.py with sklearn RandomForest wrapper
Implement train() with balanced class weights
Implement save() and load() using joblib
userStories.notes: 20% of ensemble weight - robust to outliers

userStories.title: ML Ensemble Orchestrator
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need a 4-model ensemble that combines predictions with dynamic weighting
acceptanceCriteria: Implement weighted average: XGBoost(30%) + LightGBM(25%) + LSTM(25%) + RF(20%)
Minimum 2 healthy models required for signal generation

userStories.title: Confidence Filter for Prediction Bounds
userStories.description: As an ML layer, I need to reject low-confidence predictions before they reach the strategy layer
acceptanceCriteria: Implement model agreement check (>= 50% same direction)
Implement prediction stability check (>= 60% consistent over 5 signals)
Implement regime-adjusted thresholds (trending: 0.55, ranging: 0.70, high_vol: 0.65, extreme: 0.75)
Reject signals below threshold -> convert to HOLD
Log all rejections with detailed breakdown

userStories.title: Model Trainer with Auto-Retraining
userStories.description: As an ML system, I need automatic model retraining with balanced labels and validation
acceptanceCriteria: Implement data collection (1000+ candles from database)
Implement 3-class label generation: LONG (>0.5% up), SHORT (>0.5% down), HOLD
Implement balanced sampling for equal class distribution
Implement dynamic retraining interval (13-90 minutes based on volatility)
Trigger hot reload in ensemble after successful training

userStories.title: Market Regime Detector
userStories.description: As a strategy layer, I need to classify current market regime for adaptive parameter adjustment
acceptanceCriteria: Return RegimeState with current regime and confidence

userStories.title: Portfolio State Manager
userStories.description: As a risk layer, I need to track current portfolio state including positions, exposure, and PnL
acceptanceCriteria: Track all open positions with entry price, size, side, leverage
Calculate current exposure per position and total
Calculate unrealized PnL for all positions
Track daily PnL and drawdown metrics
Sync state with exchange positions periodically

userStories.title: Position Sizer with Half-Kelly
userStories.description: As a risk layer, I need adaptive position sizing based on Kelly criterion with confidence and volatility adjustments
acceptanceCriteria: Apply confidence_factor based on signal confidence
Apply volatility_factor based on ATR regime
Apply drawdown_factor based on current drawdown
userStories.notes: Half-Kelly is more conservative than full Kelly

userStories.title: Adaptive Exposure Manager
userStories.description: As a risk layer, I need dynamic exposure limits that adapt to market conditions
acceptanceCriteria: Apply regime_factor (0.7-1.2x) based on market regime
Apply drawdown_factor (0.5-1.0x) based on current drawdown
Apply concentration_factor (0.7-1.2x) based on position count

userStories.title: Risk Manager with Multi-Layer Validation
userStories.description: As a risk layer, I need comprehensive order validation before execution
acceptanceCriteria: Implement validate_order() that runs all risk checks
Check 1: Close orders always bypass (safety first)
Check 5: Never add to losers check
Return RiskCheck result with allowed flag and reason

userStories.title: Exit Manager with Multi-Level Take Profit
userStories.description: As a strategy layer, I need sophisticated exit management with multiple TP levels and trailing stops
acceptanceCriteria: Implement 3-level take profit: TP1 (40% @ 1.5x ATR), TP2 (35% @ 2.5x ATR), TP3 (25% trailing)
Implement trailing stop: initial 2.0x ATR, trail 1.5x ATR, BE+0.3x buffer after TP1
Apply regime multipliers: trending (1.25x wider), ranging (0.8x tighter), high_vol (2.0x wider)
Calculate exit prices based on ATR and regime

userStories.title: Signal Processor with Filters
userStories.description: As a strategy layer, I need to filter and scale signals before execution
acceptanceCriteria: Implement RSI extreme filter (RSI < 30 blocks SHORT, RSI > 70 blocks LONG)
Implement ADX saturation filter (ADX > 95 or ADX < 10 blocks)
Implement MTF misalignment (4H trend opposes scales to 50%)
Implement model agreement filter (< 25% agreement = HOLD)

userStories.title: Order Manager with Execution
userStories.description: As an execution layer, I need to manage order lifecycle from signal to fill
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pre-trade slippage estimation from orderbook
Select order type: market (urgent), limit (wide spread), split+TWAP (large)
Set leverage before order (skip if position exists)
Place preset stop-loss and take-profit with order
Execute main order through REST client
Track fill status and actual slippage

userStories.title: Position Sync with Exchange
userStories.description: As an execution layer, I need to synchronize local state with exchange positions
acceptanceCriteria: Reconcile discrepancies with exchange as source of truth
Process exit conditions from exit manager

userStories.title: AI Logger for Trade Explanations
userStories.description: As a competition requirement, I need to log AI explanations for every trade decision
acceptanceCriteria: Log full trade decision context: signal, confidence, weighted_average
Log model outputs for each of 4 models
Log current market regime and risk checks
Save to ai_logs/ directory with order ID
Upload to database for competition submission

userStories.title: Utility Modules (Fee Calculator & Drift Detector)
userStories.description: As supporting infrastructure, I need utility modules for fee calculation and statistical drift detection
acceptanceCriteria: Implement maker/taker fee calculation based on WEEX fee schedule

userStories.title: Main Entry Point with Trading Loop
userStories.description: As a trading bot, I need a main entry point that orchestrates all components in the trading loop
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize all components with proper dependency injection
Implement main trading loop: data -> features -> ML -> strategy -> risk -> execution
Handle periodic tasks (position sync, model reload, stats)

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Full Pipeline
userStories.description: As a quality assurance measure, I need integration tests for the complete trading pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: Test data flow: WebSocket -> Gateway -> Features -> ML -> Strategy
Test risk validation with various scenarios

userStories.title: Systemd Service & Deployment Configuration
userStories.description: As an operator, I need deployment configuration for production running
acceptanceCriteria: Verify system starts and runs without errors
